data.name: PageTitle
data.value: Overview

data.name: PageHeading
data.value: How UncannyPrompt is organized

data.name: Intro
data.value: UncannyPrompt treats prompts as managed assets. The catalog starts from a Tenant, narrows into Workspaces and Projects, then stores prompts with folders, variables, tags, versions, and sharing metadata.

data.name: BuildingBlocksTitle
data.value: Building blocks

data.name: NameHeader
data.value: Name

data.name: MeaningHeader
data.value: Meaning

data.name: UsageHeader
data.value: Usage

data.name: TenantMeaning
data.value: The top-level account or organization boundary.

data.name: TenantUsage
data.value: Owns users, roles, Workspaces, and shared governance.

data.name: WorkspaceMeaning
data.value: A major stream of work inside a Tenant.

data.name: WorkspaceUsage
data.value: Groups related Projects and keeps navigation focused.

data.name: ProjectMeaning
data.value: The operational container for prompt work.

data.name: ProjectUsage
data.value: Holds prompts, folders, variables, sharing, and versions.

data.name: PromptMeaning
data.value: A reusable AI instruction with metadata and history.

data.name: PromptUsage
data.value: Can be edited, versioned, resolved with variables, copied, shared, and published.

data.name: WorkflowTitle
data.value: Typical workflow

data.name: WorkflowStepTenant
data.value: Sign in and work inside your Personal Tenant or another Tenant you can access.

data.name: WorkflowStepWorkspace
data.value: Choose or create a Workspace for a product area, department, customer, or initiative.

data.name: WorkflowStepProject
data.value: Create a Project to contain a concrete prompt library or workflow.

data.name: WorkflowStepPrompt
data.value: Add prompts, organize them in folders, tag them, and use variables for repeatable inputs.

data.name: WorkflowStepShare
data.value: Share access with collaborators, publish public links when needed, and review changes through versions and audit.

data.name: TraceabilityTitle
data.value: Traceability

data.name: TraceabilityVersions
data.value: Version history keeps meaningful prompt edits visible and restorable.

data.name: TraceabilityVariables
data.value: Variables make prompts reusable without hard-coding names, values, or secrets into the prompt body.

data.name: TraceabilityAudit
data.value: Audit records help teams understand who changed, shared, copied, or restored important prompt content.
